default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine AI receptionist website content strategy for Smith.ai](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to AI receptionist while preserving virtual receptionist offering](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Emphasize human support as a value-add, not just "backup"](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Highlight customization, white-glove setup, and adaptability as key differentiators](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Ensure accurate representation of AI + human capabilities and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving from 50/50 AI/virtual receptionist to 85% AI focus](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Preserve virtual receptionist offering with a call-out section](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Maintain SEO value for "virtual receptionist" keyword](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Emphasize AI receptionist with human support as primary offering](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### Copywriting Refinements

  - [Use "callers with complex situations" instead of just "complex situations"](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Adjust call duration claims (e.g., "completed in a few minutes" vs. specific times)](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Vary language beyond "backup" for human support (e.g., extension, escalation)](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Ensure clarity on AI capabilities vs. human intervention points](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

### Differentiation Strategy

  - [Highlight customization: "custom AI prompts, flexible instructions tailored to business needs"](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Emphasize white-glove setup and support as a key differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Stress adaptability of Smith.ai solution compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### Pricing and Features

  - [Clarify AI receptionist pricing (starts at $292.50, not $95)](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [Add details on overage pricing, contract terms, and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Balance "AI receptionist" and "answering service" terminology](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Provide examples of industries/use cases without implying limitations](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Website Update Process

  - [Create a hidden copy of current page in Webflow for review](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Apply learnings to other high-traffic pages (e.g., after-hours)](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Seek leadership approval before full rollout due to significant strategy shift](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update internal knowledge base/RAG system with today's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Create hidden Webflow copy of 24/7 phone answering page with new content](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Continue drafting updates for other high-traffic pages](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
  - [Await leadership review before publishing changes site-wide](https://fathom.video/share/_Vnxck63p5RR8XJ27RJk8kKZTh9JZ64x?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)

action_items.description: Update 24/7 phone answering feature page in Webflow. Incorporate Maddy's feedback. Stage w/o publishing. Hide from search crawlers.
Update internal systems/workflows. Adjust "backup"/"escalation" language. Emphasize Smith.ai customization/adaptability. Balance "AI receptionist"/"answering service" terms.
Review staged 24/7 phone answering feature page. Socialize new strategy w/ leadership for approval.
Apply meeting feedback to other feature pages. Stage w/o publishing.
